_doc: Gold set for embedding-model retrieval eval. Text-level relevance: a query is a HIT if a passage from `target` appears in top-k. `sa` = Devanagari Sanskrit rendering for the bi-query side. Authored from each text's distinctive content. Expand freely — more queries = tighter CIs.

queries.q: the great war at Kurukshetra between the Pandavas and the Kauravas
Draupadi is disrobed in the Kaurava court after the game of dice
Bhishma lying on the bed of arrows teaching dharma
Rama's exile to the forest and the abduction of Sita by Ravana
Hanuman leaps across the ocean to the city of Lanka
the world is unreal, only the self is real, consciousness alone exists
queries.sa: जगत् मिथ्या आत्मा सत्यम् चैतन्यम् ब्रह्म

queries.q: the mind imagines and projects the whole world into being
liberation while still alive, the nature of the liberated sage
Krishna counsels Arjuna on duty and action without attachment
the soul is never born and never dies, it is eternal
queries.sa: आत्मा अज नित्य न जायते न म्रियते

queries.q: the childhood pastimes of the young Krishna in Vrindavan
the circle dance of Krishna with the cowherd girls
the goddess Durga slays the buffalo demon Mahishasura
the duties of the four varnas and the four stages of life
the proper conduct and law for a righteous householder
stilling the modifications of the mind to attain yoga
the eight limbs of yoga, from restraint to absorption
hymns of praise and offering to Agni and Indra
charms and spells for healing and protection from disease
the ten avatars and the cosmic supremacy of Vishnu
the worship and the greatness of Shiva and the linga
what happens to the soul after death and the funeral rites
the birth and deeds of Skanda the warrior son of Shiva
the path of loving devotion to the supreme lord
the creation of the universe and the cosmic egg by Brahma
Vishnu as the great boar Varaha lifts the earth from the ocean
the worship of the Sun god Surya and his glory
the love of Radha and Krishna
the glory and merit of holy pilgrimage places
the great fish that saved Manu from the cosmic flood
